summary: A captured NewsNation segment ('The Bradley Report / EXCLUSIVE: THE WORST OF THE WORST') with a field reporter and a series of DHS-sourced mugshot graphic cards naming alleged criminal aliens (name, country, charges, 'ARRESTED IN ...'). Posted by DHS. It is a re-posted cable-news report.
notable_text: THE BRADLEY REPORT; EXCLUSIVE: THE WORST OF THE WORST; Source: DHS; ARRESTED IN PENNSYLVANIA / NEW YORK / UTAH
